Two outlets marked '+0.30M' in นอน 1, one mid-room and one near the bottom close to the ระเบียง boundary

Vertical home-run conduit drawn down the middle of the plan from the LP panel through โถง and นอน 1, exiting the bottom of the sheet labeled '2-10 IEC 01-25 mm.PVC นอกอาคารเดินลอย' with an arrow down to 'TO kWH METER' -- this is the meter tail/riser cable from the upstairs panel down to the ground-floor meter, matching the service cable spec on EE-02 (page 60)

warnings: GRID: dimension chain matches EE-04 (same upper-floor base plan) and the master grid file.
This is a 2-story house so this sheet only covers the upper floor; the corresponding ground-floor outlet plan is EE-05 (page 63, separate file).

This page (EE-06) also carries a general-notes/AC-circuit-table block on the right side of the sheet -- captured as a separate sibling file (บ้าน_เล็ก_2ชั้น_02_หน้า64_ac_notes.json), same convention as house #3's equivalent page.
Two 'WH' water-heater junction boxes are shown on this floor (one per upstairs bathroom), consistent with EE-02's panel schedule showing 2 water-heater circuits (one unlabeled position + position 6).
The '6/LP' circuit tag near นอน 3's ensuite bathroom cross-validates against EE-02's panel schedule circuit 6 (RCBO 20AT,1P, load 'กล่องต่อสายเครื่องทำน้ำอุ่น').
Mounting heights vary by fixture ('+0.30M' standard outlets, '+0.60M' and '+0.90M' at specific points) -- transcribed exactly as printed, not normalized or assumed to be typos.
